items.title: Anthropic unveils BioMysteryBench to test Claude's bioinformatics skills against human experts, and says Mythos solved ~30% of 23 questions that stumped experts (Anthropic)

items.title_en: Anthropic unveils BioMysteryBench to test Claude's bioinformatics skills against human experts, and says Mythos solved ~30% of 23 questions that stumped experts (Anthropic)
items.title_zh: Anthropic 推出 BioMysteryBench 来测试 Claude 与人类专家的生物信息学技能，并表示 Mythos 解决了困扰专家的 23 个问题中的约 30% (Anthropic)
items.title_bilingual: Anthropic 推出 BioMysteryBench 来测试 Claude 与人类专家的生物信息学技能，并表示 Mythos 解决了困扰专家的 23 个问题中的约 30% (Anthropic) / Anthropic unveils BioMysteryBench to test Claude's bioinformatics skills against human experts, and says Mythos solved ~30% of 23 questions that stumped experts (Anthropic)

items.title: Hyundai unveils Pleos Connect, a next-generation infotainment system with Gleo AI voice assistant, debuting in May on the new Grandeur sedan in South Korea (Hyonhee Shin/Bloomberg)

items.title_en: Hyundai unveils Pleos Connect, a next-generation infotainment system with Gleo AI voice assistant, debuting in May on the new Grandeur sedan in South Korea (Hyonhee Shin/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 现代汽车推出 Pleos Connect，这是一款配备 Gleo AI 语音助手的下一代信息娱乐系统，该系统于 5 月份在韩国的新款 Grandeur 轿车上首次亮相（Hyonhee Shin/彭博社）

items.title: OpenAI says it has signed contracts for 10GW of US AI compute capacity, with 3GW+ added in the past 90 days, hitting a goal it once aimed to reach by 2029 (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)

items.title_en: OpenAI says it has signed contracts for 10GW of US AI compute capacity, with 3GW+ added in the past 90 days, hitting a goal it once aimed to reach by 2029 (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: OpenAI 表示已签署了 10GW 的美国人工智能计算能力合同，过去 90 天内新增了 3GW 以上，实现了其曾经计划在 2029 年实现的目标（Dina Bass/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: OpenAI 表示已签署了 10GW 的美国人工智能计算能力合同，过去 90 天内新增了 3GW 以上，实现了其曾经计划在 2029 年实现的目标（Dina Bass/彭博社） / OpenAI says it has signed contracts for 10GW of US AI compute capacity, with 3GW+ added in the past 90 days, hitting a goal it once aimed to reach by 2029 (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)

items.title:
为什么从gpt到现在已经三年多了
还是这种交互
侧边栏会话记录+对话详情+artifact
再多一点儿可能再分一个层级出四栏
或者上下再分层级tab

之所以没有新的交互形式革新
我觉得至关重要的一点...

items.title: Rogo, which uses AI to help lighten junior bankers' workloads, raised a $160M Series D led by Kleiner Perkins at a $2B valuation, up from $750M in January (Todd Gillespie/Bloomberg)

items.title_en: Rogo, which uses AI to help lighten junior bankers' workloads, raised a $160M Series D led by Kleiner Perkins at a $2B valuation, up from $750M in January (Todd Gillespie/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: Rogo 利用人工智能帮助减轻初级银行家的工作量，以 20 亿美元的估值筹集了由 Kleiner Perkins 领投的 1.6 亿美元 D 轮融资，高于 1 月份的 7.5 亿美元（Todd Gillespie/彭博社）

items.title: Sources: OpenAI has, in practice, abandoned its Stargate JV in favor of large bilateral deals; execs say its guiding principle remains to "build more compute" (Financial Times)

items.title_zh: 资料来源：OpenAI 实际上已经放弃了 Stargate 合资企业，转而支持大型双边交易；高管表示其指导原则仍然是“构建更多计算能力”（金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 资料来源：OpenAI 实际上已经放弃了 Stargate 合资企业，转而支持大型双边交易；高管表示其指导原则仍然是“构建更多计算能力”（金融时报） / Sources: OpenAI has, in practice, abandoned its Stargate JV in favor of large bilateral deals; execs say its guiding principle remains to "build more compute" (Financial Times)

items.title: Mayo Clinic researchers detail an AI system called Redmod that identified pancreatic cancer on routine CT scans an average of 475 days before clinical diagnosis (Jason Gale/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Mayo Clinic researchers detail an AI system called Redmod that identified pancreatic cancer on routine CT scans an average of 475 days before clinical diagnosis (Jason Gale/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Mayo Clinic researchers detail an AI system called Redmod that identified pancreatic cancer on routine CT scans an average of 475 days before clinical diagnosis (Jason Gale/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: Mayo Clinic 研究人员详细介绍了一种名为 Redmod 的 AI 系统，该系统平均在临床诊断前 475 天通过常规 CT 扫描识别出胰腺癌（Jason Gale/Bloomberg）
items.title_bilingual: Mayo Clinic 研究人员详细介绍了一种名为 Redmod 的 AI 系统，该系统平均在临床诊断前 475 天通过常规 CT 扫描识别出胰腺癌（Jason Gale/Bloomberg） / Mayo Clinic researchers detail an AI system called Redmod that identified pancreatic cancer on routine CT scans an average of 475 days before clinical diagnosis (Jason Gale/Bloomberg)

items.title: A working paper uses an LLM to analyze political discourse on X, finding that anger is the dominant emotion expressed by US users, especially those over 65 (Tim Harford/Financial Times)

items.title_en: A working paper uses an LLM to analyze political discourse on X, finding that anger is the dominant emotion expressed by US users, especially those over 65 (Tim Harford/Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 一篇工作论文利用法学硕士分析了 X 上的政治话语，发现愤怒是美国用户表达的主要情绪，尤其是 65 岁以上的用户（Tim Harford/金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 一篇工作论文利用法学硕士分析了 X 上的政治话语，发现愤怒是美国用户表达的主要情绪，尤其是 65 岁以上的用户（Tim Harford/金融时报） / A working paper uses an LLM to analyze political discourse on X, finding that anger is the dominant emotion expressed by US users, especially those over 65 (Tim Harford/Financial Times)

items.title: Chinese regulators killed the Manus template by blocking Meta's $2B takeover in a 54-character decree, creating an uncertain era for China's growing AI industry (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Chinese regulators killed the Manus template by blocking Meta's $2B takeover in a 54-character decree, creating an uncertain era for China's growing AI industry (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Chinese regulators killed the Manus template by blocking Meta's $2B takeover in a 54-character decree, creating an uncertain era for China's growing AI industry (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 中国监管机构通过一项 54 个字符的法令阻止 Meta 20 亿美元的收购，从而扼杀了 Manus 模板，为中国不断发展的人工智能行业创造了一个不确定的时代（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 中国监管机构通过一项 54 个字符的法令阻止 Meta 20 亿美元的收购，从而扼杀了 Manus 模板，为中国不断发展的人工智能行业创造了一个不确定的时代（彭博社） / Chinese regulators killed the Manus template by blocking Meta's $2B takeover in a 54-character decree, creating an uncertain era for China's growing AI industry (Bloomberg)

items.title: Cognizant agrees to acquire Astreya, which helps manage data center infrastructure, AI lab environments, and enterprise networks, for ~$600M, set to close in Q2 (Reuters)
items.title_original: Cognizant agrees to acquire Astreya, which helps manage data center infrastructure, AI lab environments, and enterprise networks, for ~$600M, set to close in Q2 (Reuters)
items.title_en: Cognizant agrees to acquire Astreya, which helps manage data center infrastructure, AI lab environments, and enterprise networks, for ~$600M, set to close in Q2 (Reuters)
items.title_zh: Cognizant 同意以约 6 亿美元的价格收购 Astreya，该公司帮助管理数据中心基础设施、人工智能实验室环境和企业网络，预计将于第二季度完成（路透社）
items.title_bilingual: Cognizant 同意以约 6 亿美元的价格收购 Astreya，该公司帮助管理数据中心基础设施、人工智能实验室环境和企业网络，预计将于第二季度完成（路透社） / Cognizant agrees to acquire Astreya, which helps manage data center infrastructure, AI lab environments, and enterprise networks, for ~$600M, set to close in Q2 (Reuters)

items.title_original: Cash-rich AI startups fuel a boom in Manhattan's commercial real-estate market; many offices have more vacant desks than workers, as startups prepare to scale (Isabelle Bousquette/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: Cash-rich AI startups fuel a boom in Manhattan's commercial real-estate market; many offices have more vacant desks than workers, as startups prepare to scale (Isabelle Bousquette/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 现金充裕的人工智能初创公司推动了曼哈顿商业房地产市场的繁荣；随着初创公司准备扩大规模，许多办公室的空置办公桌比员工还多（Isabelle Bousquette/华尔街日报）

items.title: Knight Frank: Anthropic, OpenAI, and other AI companies have leased 1M+ square feet of London office space since the start of 2025, or ~7% of all lettings (Natasha Voase/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Knight Frank: Anthropic, OpenAI, and other AI companies have leased 1M+ square feet of London office space since the start of 2025, or ~7% of all lettings (Natasha Voase/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Knight Frank: Anthropic, OpenAI, and other AI companies have leased 1M+ square feet of London office space since the start of 2025, or ~7% of all lettings (Natasha Voase/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: Knight Frank：自 2025 年初以来，Anthropic、OpenAI 和其他人工智能公司已租赁了超过 100 万平方英尺的伦敦办公空间，约占总租赁量的 7%（Natasha Voase/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: Knight Frank：自 2025 年初以来，Anthropic、OpenAI 和其他人工智能公司已租赁了超过 100 万平方英尺的伦敦办公空间，约占总租赁量的 7%（Natasha Voase/彭博社） / Knight Frank: Anthropic, OpenAI, and other AI companies have leased 1M+ square feet of London office space since the start of 2025, or ~7% of all lettings (Natasha Voase/Bloomberg)

items.title: Samsung's Lee family dynasty reached a combined ~$45.5B net worth in March, up from ~$20.1B in 2025, amid the AI boom; they are now Asia's third-richest family (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Samsung's Lee family dynasty reached a combined ~$45.5B net worth in March, up from ~$20.1B in 2025, amid the AI boom; they are now Asia's third-richest family (Bloomberg)
